mapper.select: SELECT i.id, i.outbound_id, i.material_id, i.material_name, i.spec, i.unit, i.warehouse_id, i.location_id, i.quantity, i.unit_cost, i.total_cost, i.batch_no, i.inventory_id, i.expiry_date, i.purpose, i.remark, w.warehouse_name, l.location_name FROM wms_outbound_order_item i LEFT JOIN wms_warehouse w ON w.id = i.warehouse_id AND w.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN wms_location l ON l.id = i.location_id WHERE i.outbound_id = #{outboundId} ORDER BY i.id
